The '''Pangay Ous''' were an [[Alwari]] clan on [[Ansion/Legends|Ansion]]. They were a part of the [[Northern Bands]], and could be identified by their lightweight, waterproof robes.<ref name="TCSWE" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The Approaching Storm]]''
